overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a western-themed video game showing a character in period clothing walking through a sunlit residential backyard area with wooden shacks, clotheslines, and tropical vegetation. The character passes a seated NPC on a porch and proceeds toward a wooden staircase leading to an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential backyard with clotheslines and wooden shacks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the residential yard toward the rear staircase, passing by wooden shacks and laundry lines

notable_agents.action: woman sitting on porch steps, watching the character walk past

entered.detail: weathered blue wooden house with white porch railing and chimney
raised wooden porch with white railings and steps
overhead clothesline with white sheets and garments hanging
stack of wooden barrels and crates near the house
vintage hand-operated water pump with bucket
large tropical banana plant with broad leaves
wooden staircase leading up to second level of the property

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit residential backyard with dirt ground, passing a blue wooden cottage on the left where a woman sits on the porch. Overhead clotheslines with laundry stretch across the yard, while wooden barrels and a water pump sit near the path. The character heads toward a wooden staircase at the rear, with banana trees and stone walls visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden staircase ascending to upper residential level

events.description: character transitions from walking on flat ground to ascending the wooden stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden stairs at the back of the property toward the upper level

entered.detail: elevated wooden building with balcony visible at the top of the stairs
weathered stone retaining wall alongside the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending the wooden staircase at the rear of the property, transitioning from the open yard to a more enclosed stairwell. The blue cottage and seated NPC fall behind as the character climbs toward an upper wooden structure, with stone walls on the right and laundry lines now visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit residential backyard that transitions into an ascent up a wooden staircase. It begins by following a character across a dirt yard, passing a blue wooden cottage where a woman sits on the porch while laundry hangs from overhead clotheslines. As the character moves past wooden barrels and a water pump, the view opens to reveal banana trees and stone walls on the right. The scene then shifts as the character reaches the rear of the property and begins climbing a wooden staircase, leaving the open yard and the seated NPC behind. Finally, the perspective moves from the bright exterior into a more enclosed stairwell, ascending toward an upper wooden structure with the laundry lines now visible to the left.
